rights_source: Made-in-China storefront operated by Shandong KAMA Automobile Manufacturing Co., Ltd. — registry entry ratified 2026-07-08
dimensions: 1894x872 (chosen 3/4-front frame); listing also has a clean side profile 1955x900
notes: M37A listing = M3 family (3-ton, single 1900mm cabin — normal posture, NOT the ultra-wide M6 cab discovery flagged; watch-out resolved). Passed pre-flight (resolution via 2f0j00 originals, 3/4-front angle) and SKU-match (M3 family). Killed at EXTRACTION — see deferred-row.md. All 6 gallery frames are field shots against foliage with mirrors wrapped in protective shipping foam; no studio-background frame exists in this listing.
